name: PAY_TASK_STATUS_OV_SUMMARY_VL
query: select FLOW_INSTANCE_ID, FLOW_NAME,DECODE(TASK_STATUS,'COMPLETE','Completed','COMPLETE_WITH_ISSUES','Completed','SKIPPED', 'Skipped','Pending') as status, COUNT(*) Task_Num from PAY_TASK_STATUS_VL GROUP BY FLOW_INSTANCE_ID,FLOW_NAME,DECODE(TASK_STATUS,'COMPLETE','Completed','COMPLETE_WITH_ISSUES','Completed','SKIPPED', 'Skipped','Pending')
